# rhcs_ocm_role_links (Data Source)

List of linked OCM roles for an organization



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `organization_id` (String) OCM organization ID (automatically determined from the current user)
- `role_arns` (List of String) List of linked AWS IAM role ARNs for the organization
